intent_summary: Phase 5.8 case_004: un33k/python-slugify@7edf477 fixes the CLI --regex-pattern path (argparse accepted it but slugify_params dropped it). Patch adds regex_pattern to the params default map plus TestCommandParams.test_regex_pattern asserting both the params mapping and slugify() output. Verifier grounds a precondition_supported claim that pytest test.py demonstrates the forwarding precondition.

evidence_items.summary: python-slugify upstream commit 7edf477 ('Fix --regex-pattern being ignored by the CLI', author Jacobo de Vera, fixes #175) updates slugify/slugify.py to add regex_pattern to the CLI default map and adds TestCommandParams.test_regex_pattern in test.py asserting both argument mapping and slug output.

Operator intent (cgpro session phase58-soak conversation 69ef3a8c-0198-8394-8f09-14a7b120d192): pure-Python CLI-to-library wiring fix on a small repo, distinct from case_002 negative-path on a constructor and case_003 observability on a C extension. Strategy: target_install=true so console_scripts entry points resolve and parse_args + slugify_params are importable.
